item_type: Default number of records per page
description: Testing the default configuration of records displayed per page

description: Testing scroll functionality and loading behavior in different page positions

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check scroll up function when displaying position is:
+ Middle of page 
+ Bottom of page 
+ The last page
+ Any page
expected_result:
Can view all page with correctly records
Loading icon is displayed while load a new page

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check scroll down function when displaying position is:
+ Middle of page 
+ Bottom of page 
+ The last page
+ Any page
expected_result:
Can view all page with correctly records
Loading icon is displayed while load a new page

description: Testing pagination behavior with page refresh

expected_result: All the records of the first is display

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check pagination display when press [Enter] of keyboard
expected_result: All the records of the first is display
